design_language.overall_aesthetic: Sports broadcast graphic style mixed with food photography
design_language.visual_approach: Deep blue background resembling a stadium or team jersey, with food and sports equipment arranged on a 'field' surface

color_logic.primary_background: Deep Royal Blue (#003366 approx) - creates a strong contrast to the usual brand orange, signaling a 'team' or 'night match' vibe
color_logic.accent_color: Swiggy Orange (Logo only) and Natural Food Tones
color_logic.text_color: White - maximum readability against dark blue
color_logic.color_usage: Blue dominates to set the sports context; food colors (golden bun, red chili) pop against the cool background

typography.placement: Top left aligned, hierarchy leads with the discount

graphics_and_images.hero_images: Burger on a black plate (left), Biryani in a clay pot (right)
graphics_and_images.props: Cricket bat, red ball, helmet, gloves scattered in the foreground
graphics_and_images.background_graphic: Faint outline of a stadium crowd/stands in the upper background

ads.message_delivery: Connects the excitement of cricket (Sixes) directly to food rewards. The scattered equipment implies 'game time'.

design_language.overall_aesthetic: High-energy brand marketing with surreal 3D elements
design_language.visual_approach: Solid brand-color background with a central floating hero product and a miniature 3D prop

color_logic.primary_background: Swiggy Orange (#FF5A03 approx) - full brand immersion
color_logic.color_usage: Monochromatic orange background forces focus entirely on the food and the white text

typography.weight: Bold for headlines, Heavy for numbers
typography.placement: Left aligned within a dashed border box

graphics_and_images.hero_image: Large, juicy burger floating in mid-air with cheese dripping
graphics_and_images.graphic_element: Miniature cricket stadium graphic at the bottom center, glowing with floodlights
graphics_and_images.framing: Dashed white line border creating a 'ticket' or 'coupon' feel

ads.message_delivery: Visual metaphor: The burger is 'hitting a six' (floating above the stadium). High impact visual for social media scrolling.

design_language.visual_approach: Identical to Ad 2 but cropped/adjusted for vertical mobile screens

typography.placement: Upper third of the screen for immediate readability on mobile

ads.message_delivery: Optimized for Instagram Stories/Reels. Quick consumption of the offer details.

design_language.visual_approach: Repetition of the successful visual motif

ads.message_delivery: Reinforces the campaign message through repetition.

design_language.visual_approach: Same visual, slight text variation highlighting cashback

design_language.overall_aesthetic: Traditional Indian festive design with modern layout
design_language.visual_approach: Gradient background, traditional props, line-art architecture, spread of traditional food

color_logic.primary_background: Gradient from Swiggy Orange (top) to Deep Magenta/Pink (bottom) - signifies festivity and warmth
color_logic.text_color: Dark Maroon/Brown - softer than black, fits the traditional theme
color_logic.color_usage: Warm palette evokes home, celebration, and traditional Indian values

typography.font_style: Serif for headlines (more traditional feel), Sans-serif for body
typography.placement: Centered alignment for a formal, invitation-like feel

graphics_and_images.hero_images: Spread of Indian festival food (Thali, Puri, Sabudana Khichdi, etc.)
graphics_and_images.background_graphic: Line art of Indian monuments (Taj Mahal, Gateway of India, etc.) - signifies pan-India presence
graphics_and_images.props: Marigold flower garlands (top corners), Diyas/Oil lamps (bottom corners)
graphics_and_images.logo_placement: Top center in a solid orange header bar

ads.message_delivery: Connects the brand to cultural moments. Positions Swiggy as a partner in celebration, not just a delivery service.

brand_consistency.logo_usage: Consistent placement (Top Center or Top Left) across all ads
brand_consistency.tagline: 'Food you love, on time' is present in almost all creatives
brand_consistency.color_palette: Swiggy Orange is the primary anchor color, used either as the full background or the header bar

visual_motifs.cricket_campaign: Uses a specific visual language of 'floating food' and 'miniature stadiums' to gamify the offer
visual_motifs.festive_campaign: Uses traditional iconography (diyas, monuments, garlands) to blend modern tech with tradition

overall_design_system_analysis.typography_strategy: Bold, rounded sans-serifs are used for 90% of the ads for maximum legibility on mobile screens. Serif fonts are reserved only for the festive ad to add a touch of tradition.

layout_logic.hierarchy: Logo -> Headline/Offer -> Hero Image -> CTA/Fine Print
layout_logic.spacing: Generous use of negative space (especially in the orange ads) to prevent clutter and focus attention on the food
